mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indicates expanding manufacturing output, which drives corporate earnings expectations and lifts the S&P 500 over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward 20-day return direction accuracy fails to exceed 55% over a 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate falls below 0.25%, the zero lower bound constraint forces investors out of money-market instruments and into equities, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: S&P 500 forward 20-day returns are negative in more than 50% of months when FEDFUNDS is below 0.25%.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous elevation in UNRATE above 8% and month-over-month increase in INDPRO indicates a productivity-driven recovery where output expands without immediate wage pressure, lifting profit expectations and equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal does not produce positive 60-day forward returns in at least 55% of triggered observations during a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: In a post-crisis liquidity trap regime, an increase in CPIAUCSL indicates reflation rather than tightening risk, reducing real debt burdens and supporting equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: During FEDFUNDS < 1% regimes, month-over-month CPIAUCSL increases are followed by negative 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 45% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month growth in retail sales directly captures consumer spending momentum, which constitutes the largest component of GDP and precedes revenue beats for consumer-facing equities, lifting the S&P 500 over the next week.
failure_condition: Month-over-month RSAFS increases are followed by negative 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 50% of instances over a rolling 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month decline in the unemployment rate of at least 0.2 percentage points signals a discrete inflection in labor market tightness, accelerating wage-driven consumption and producing positive equity returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE declines by at least 0.2pp from prior month
failure_condition: S&P 500 20-day forward returns are negative in more than 40% of months following a 0.2pp UNRATE drop.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month increases in nonfarm payrolls and consumer prices indicate a healthy reflationary expansion where demand growth outpaces cost pressures, supporting corporate revenue expansion and positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint PAYEMS-CPIAUCSL signal produces a 20-day Rank IC below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real GDP signals a durable recovery in aggregate demand that reduces recession probability and compresses equity risk premiums, generating positive returns over the following quarter.
failure_condition: Positive GDPC1 growth prints are followed by negative 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 50% of quarters during a 3-year walk-forward test.
